Moneysupermarket.com ( (GB:MONY) ) has provided an update.

MONY Group PLC, a player in the financial industry, focuses on securities trading and investment management. The company has executed a repurchase of 74,173 of its ordinary shares on the London Stock Exchange, with the intention to cancel these shares. This move is likely part of a strategic effort to optimize capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value, impacting its market positioning and stakeholder interests.

data.title: Angkor Resources Launches Drilling at Wild Boar Prospect in Cambodia
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Angkor Gold ( (TSE:ANK) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Angkor Resources Corp. has started diamond drilling at the Wild Boar prospect in Cambodia’s Andong Meas tenement, targeting gold anomalies identified through recent magnetic surveys and surface samples. The project, which involves partnerships and planned compensation for landowners, is expected to last several weeks and aims to explore significant gold and copper potential, enhancing Angkor’s strategic position in the mining sector.

More about Angkor Gold

Angkor Resources Corp. operates in the mining industry, focusing on gold and copper exploration. The company is engaged in projects in Cambodia, including the Andong Meas tenement known for its gold and copper prospects.

data.title: Teck Resources Achieves Record Copper Production and Strengthens Financial Position in 2024
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Teck Resources ( ($TSE:TECK.B) ) has issued an update.

Teck Resources Limited reported its unaudited fourth-quarter results for 2024, highlighting a year of transformation with record copper production and the sale of its steelmaking coal business. The company returned $1.8 billion to shareholders in 2024 and reduced its debt by $1.8 billion, achieving a strong financial position that supports its long-term growth strategy. Teck’s Quebrada Blanca (QB) project ramped up effectively, contributing to record quarterly copper production, and the company has set ambitious targets for 2025. Teck also achieved notable profitability and revenue growth in its copper and zinc businesses, while maintaining a low High-Potential Incident Frequency rate, and received recognition for its workplace and sustainability efforts.

More about Teck Resources

Teck Resources Limited is a company based in Vancouver, British Columbia, primarily focused on energy transition metals, with significant operations in copper production.

YTD Price Performance: 4.35%

Average Trading Volume: 2,578,484

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $21.75B

data.title: Virgin Wines UK PLC Announces Managerial Share Transactions
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Virgin Wines UK PLC ( (GB:VINO) ) has provided an update.

Virgin Wines UK PLC announced transactions involving its ordinary shares by key managerial personnel under the company’s Long Term Incentive Plan. Amanda Cherry, Head of Group Finance, and Ian Long, Operations Director, exercised and subsequently sold options totaling 31,100 and 14,226 ordinary shares respectively. These transactions, conducted on the London Stock Exchange AIM Market, reflect the company’s ongoing efforts to align managerial incentives with shareholder interests.

More about Virgin Wines UK PLC

Virgin Wines UK PLC is a leading direct-to-consumer online wine retailer in the UK, offering an extensive portfolio of nearly 700 wines and around 150 spirits. Established in 2000 by the Virgin Group, the company has garnered a reputation for high-quality products, excellent customer service, and innovative retailing. It operates primarily through its WineBank subscription scheme, serving an active customer base of over 170,000 members, and was listed on the London Stock Exchange’s AIM in 2021.

data.title: Pacific Green Sells Battery Park to Intera Renewables
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Pacific Green Technologies ( (PGTK) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On February 21, 2025, Pacific Green Technologies announced the sale of its 250MW / 500MWh Limestone Coast North Battery Energy Park to Intera Renewables, managed by Palisade Investment Partners, for A$460 million. This transaction marks a milestone in Pacific Green’s growth in Australia, accelerating the country’s net-zero transition and enhancing grid stability. Pacific Green will oversee construction until operations commence in 2027, with Palisade managing the asset thereafter. The sale is part of Pacific Green’s 10GWh battery energy park development pipeline in Australia, strengthening its position as a leading utility-scale battery developer in the region.

More about Pacific Green Technologies

Pacific Green Technologies, Inc. is a global energy storage and environmental technology company focused on advancing the transition to sustainable energy solutions. The company is rapidly building a portfolio of utility-scale battery energy storage systems with a current pipeline of 14GWh in development, construction, or operation. It combines technology, project development, and finance expertise with strategic partnerships in the global environmental supply chain.

YTD Price Performance: -27.45%

Average Trading Volume: 4,490

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $19.37M

data.title: Pinewood Technologies Announces Equity Fundraise for Strategic Acquisition and Growth
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Pinewood Technologies ( (GB:PINE) ) has provided an update.

Pinewood Technologies has announced an equity fundraise to support the acquisition of Seez App Holding Ltd. and to bolster its development pipeline. The acquisition, valued at approximately £33.3 million, aims to integrate Seez’s advanced AI products with Pinewood’s platform, promising significant growth opportunities. The fundraise will also provide financial flexibility to pursue strategic goals, including expansion across key global markets. The completion of the acquisition is expected to be earnings accretive by FY26, enhancing service offerings and industry positioning for stakeholders.

More about Pinewood Technologies

Pinewood Technologies Group PLC operates in the automotive technology industry. The company focuses on automotive intelligence solutions, leveraging AI and machine learning to enhance customer offerings. It targets markets across the UK, North America, APAC, DACH, and South Africa, aiming to grow its technology suite and customer base.

data.title: Lexaria Bioscience Targets Breakthrough in Oral Diabetes Medication
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest announcement is out from Lexaria Bioscience ( (LEXX) ).

Lexaria Bioscience has announced its strategic decision to explore the commercialization of an orally-dosed version of liraglutide using its DehydraTECH technology, following the drug’s patent expiration. Successful animal studies have shown DehydraTECH-liraglutide’s superior performance in blood sugar and body weight control compared to existing treatments, positioning Lexaria to potentially enter the lucrative GLP-1 weight loss and diabetes market. The company is preparing for pilot clinical trials of this oral formulation, aiming to expand its presence in a market projected to grow significantly.

More about Lexaria Bioscience

Lexaria Bioscience Corp. is a global innovator in drug delivery platforms, focusing on enhancing the administration of pharmaceutical substances. The company’s primary product, DehydraTECH, is a technology designed to improve the delivery and effectiveness of drugs, with a particular focus on pharmaceuticals for weight loss and diabetes management.

YTD Price Performance: -30.87%

Average Trading Volume: 183,479

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $26.5M

data.title: Hofseth Biocare ASA Announces Shareholding Changes Following Fund Liquidation
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest announcement is out from Hofseth Biocare ASA ( (HOFBF) ).

Hofseth Biocare ASA announced a reduction in shareholding through Bonafide Funds, which resulted from the expiration of a mandate in the Bonafide Investment Fund – HBC I. The liquidation finalized on February 18, 2025, led to shares being delivered directly to fund investors, altering the company’s voting rights distribution.

More about Hofseth Biocare ASA

Hofseth Biocare ASA is a Norwegian company operating in the biotechnology industry, focusing on developing high-value ingredients and products derived from fish. The company primarily targets the health and nutrition sectors, offering bioactive peptides, proteins, and oils.
